overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a flying vehicle navigating through a dense, foggy cyberpunk cityscape at night. The scene features a toxic green atmosphere with towering futuristic skyscrapers and industrial platforms illuminated by scattered city lights.

events.description: vehicle slows from cruising speed to near hover, speedometer drops to 1 km/h
thick green fog momentarily obscures distant buildings

agents.ego_description: piloting the flying car through dense fog, slowing down to navigate between towering structures

entered.detail: futuristic vehicle dashboard with illuminated speedometer and control gauges
slender futuristic tower piercing through the green fog
massive industrial structure with glowing windows

segments.scene_description: The vehicle decelerates through thick green fog in a dense urban canyon. The cockpit dashboard remains illuminated while massive spires and industrial towers loom in the distance, barely visible through the toxic haze.

events.description: vehicle accelerates from hover to 45 km/h, passing between buildings
brighter neon lights from distant structures become visible through fog

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the city airspace, navigating between towering structures

entered.detail: suspended industrial platform with warning lights
tall building with vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates through the foggy corridor between mega-structures. A floating platform appears on the right while the industrial tower moves closer on the left. The speed increases significantly as neon lights from distant buildings pierce the green haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city airspace with scattered platforms

events.description: emerging from dense fog into slightly clearer airspace with more visible structures

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through the upper atmosphere of the city, passing holographic advertisements

entered.detail: floating digital advertisement screen with glowing red and white lights
circular landing pad with illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: The vehicle cruises at high speed through the upper city levels where the fog thins slightly. A holographic billboard and landing platform come into view on the right, while the industrial structures from earlier segments fade behind. The green atmospheric haze persists but visibility improves enough to see the scattered platforms and distant city lights.

[t=20s] cockpit_dashboard(center_near), floating_structure(right_mid), city_glow(center_far)

=== Segment 2 [25.0s - 40.0s] ===
[t=30s] cockpit_dashboard(center_near), holographic_billboard(right_mid), skyscraper_cluster(center_far)
[t=35s] cockpit_dashboard(center_near), landing_platform(right_far), neon_signage(left_mid)

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight through a toxic green urban canyon that transitions from a slow, claustrophobic crawl into a high-speed cruise through the upper city. It begins with the vehicle decelerating through thick green fog, where the illuminated cockpit dashboard contrasts with the looming, barely visible silhouettes of massive spires and industrial towers. As the vehicle accelerates through the foggy corridor, the camera glides between mega-structures, passing a floating platform on the right while neon lights begin to pierce the haze. The scene then opens up as the vehicle reaches high speeds in the upper city levels, where the fog thins to reveal a holographic billboard and landing platforms. Finally, the industrial structures fade into the distance as visibility improves, leaving the vehicle to cruise amidst scattered platforms and distant city lights under a persistent green atmospheric glow.
